title: TCP port capped at 32767 rejects valid high ports
description: Client::connect rejects TCP ports 32768-65535 with BadArgs because posixTransportTcpConfig.server_port is a C i16. Valid TCP ports include the entire range 1-65535. Any user whose wolfHSM server listens on a port above 32767 (e.g. 40000, 50000, 8443) will get an opaque error message rather than a working connection. The i16 field in the C struct is a wolfHSM C library issue, but the Rust wrapper should document this as a known limitation and note the workaround (use ports <= 32767).
